tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
You are an obsession (You are an obsession)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]
I cannot (I cannot sleep) sleep[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I am a possession (I am your possession)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
There's no balance (There is no balance)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
No equality (No equality)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
Be still (Be still)[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
I will not (I will not) accept defeat (accept defeat)[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
I will have you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Yes, I will have you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
I will find a way and I will have you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
Like a butterfly[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
A wild butterfly[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
I will collect you and capture you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
You are an obsession[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
You're my obsession[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]

You're my obsession[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
My day and my night[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
I need you I need you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
By sun or candlelight[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
You protest; you want to leave[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Stay, oh, (there's no alternative) there's no alternative[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
But I see danger[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
